message:
test(pt-core): add comprehensive safety gate tests (c982)

Implement 35 test cases covering all safety gate acceptance criteria:
- Data-loss gates: open write fds, SQLite WAL, git locks, deleted CWD
- Zombie handling: state detection, parent routing, filter records
- D-state handling: uninterruptible sleep, wchan inspection
- Identity/coordination: PID reuse, start_id mismatch, UID enforcement,
  lock contention, stale lock recovery
- Protected processes: systemd, sshd, docker, PID 1, root user,
  PPID protection, custom glob patterns, database services
- Session safety: session leader, TTY handling
- PreCheck integration: provider execution, executor integration

All 35 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
